subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up from Vendor Inc. following the conference last month. I'd be glad to schedule a 30-minute call to explore potential collaboration opportunities.

For next week, I have availability on Tuesday afternoon or Wednesday morning. Please let me know which time slot works best for your team, and I'll send over a calendar invitation.

Regarding connecting with our technical leadership, I'd be happy to facilitate introductions once we've had our initial discussion and identified the specific technical areas where collaboration would be most valuable. This helps ensure we involve the right stakeholders from the start.

Looking forward to connecting soon.

Best regards,
[Your Name/Team]
Company
